# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Commands

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      runner:
        description: Runner label to use (e.g., ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest)
        required: false
        default: ubuntu-latest
        type: string
      shell:
        description: Shell to use for custom commands (bash, pwsh, sh)
        required: false
        default: bash
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
      checkout:
        description: Whether to checkout repository
        required: false
        default: true
        type: boolean
      setup_node:
        description: Whether to setup Node.js
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      node_version:
        description: Node.js version (if setup_node is true)
        required: false
        default: "20"
        type: string
      setup_python:
        description: Whether to setup Python
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      python_version:
        description: Python version (if setup_python is true)
        required: false
        default: "3.11"
        type: string
      pre_build:
        description: Commands to run before build
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      build:
        description: Build commands to run
        required: true
        default: ""
        type: string
      post_build:
        description: Commands to run after build
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: Working directory for commands (relative path)
        required: false
        default: "."
        type: string
      fail_on_stderr:
        description: Fail if anything is written to stderr (best-effort; depends on shell)
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  custom-build:
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        if: ${{ inputs.checkout }}
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: ${{ inputs.setup_node }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ inputs.setup_python }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Pre-build commands
        if: ${{ inputs.pre_build != '' }}
        run: ${{ inputs.pre_build }}
        env:
          FAIL_ON_STDERR: ${{ inputs.fail_on_stderr }}

      - name: Build commands
        run: ${{ inputs.build }}
        env:
          FAIL_ON_STDERR: ${{ inputs.fail_on_stderr }}

      - name: Post-build commands
        if: ${{ inputs.post_build != '' }}
        run: ${{ inputs.post_build }}
        env:
          FAIL_ON_STDERR: ${{ inputs.fail_on_stderr }}
